notes: Probe-validated - full text AND dates. 30 speech PDFs. country=Ethiopia; source_url=https://pmo.gov.et/speeches/; region=Africa; iso3n=231; source_type=PM Website; content_format=fulltext | Ethiopia's PM is the head of government, so this is the high-value Ethiopian source (eth_thepresidency is ceremonial AND its domain is dead). Speeches are PDFs; bodies extract cleanly in Amharic and English (1.9k-10.8k chars) and the PDF's FIRST LINE is exactly the title (matches the listing verbatim), so title needs no selector. pagination=none is correct (?page=/?paged= are ignored and re-serve page 1). Dates now come from the HTML listing via listing.item_date (issue #55, fixed): all 30 rows date, 2018-05-14..2023-10-06 - this is why it is now draft rather than partial. The date is NOT recovered from the filename: those use the ETHIOPIAN calendar (~7-8 yrs behind) - '..._2015.pdf' is listed as Jan 27 2023, and 'PM_Message_Adwa2014.pdf' is the Adwa 126th anniversary = 2022. The LISTING dates are Gregorian and span Abiy's term, but with only 30 items and nothing since Oct 2023. Siblings worth a source each: /statements/, /press_release/, /articles/.
